element_introduction_order.mastery_context: New mechanic added to original, expands combo potential
Powerful spacing tool, increased knockback distance
Returning characters gain expanded special move sets
Vertical combat dimension, aerial combo extension
Increased combo fluidity vs. original game
Climactic opponent, prevents finishing move usage against/by
Expanded fighting style variety, series-expanding movesets

typical_tension_triggers: Final round scenarios (round 2 decisive win conditions)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced combat with faster gameplay speed than original; round-based tension release structure; acceleration of combo potential increases moment-to-moment intensity

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden characters (Noob Saibot) unlock through specific tournament paths or input sequences

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory tournament opponents with basic movesets; tutorial-adjacent difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Expanded special move usage from opponents; increased combo frequency; new characters introduce varied fighting styles
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss character (Shao Kahn) with home-field advantage; increased aggression; prevents finishing move execution against boss
notable_spikes: Transition from Earthrealm to Outworld setting (Shao Kahn's strategic disadvantage for player)

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential opponent encounters building to boss fight; narrative framing of Outworld tournament with home-field advantage disadvantage for Earthrealm warriors
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progression to final Shao Kahn encounter after tournament bracket completion

notable_level_patterns.description: Each arena features contextual stage Fatality mechanics (Pit II abyss, spikes in ceiling, acid pools, etc.)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Pit II Stage Fatality with background Blaze figure

notable_level_patterns.description: Each character gains multiple Fatalities plus Babality, Friendship, and special moves creating high replayability variation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any tournament match with different character selections
